title: Salt and Pepper Shakers Stainless Steel and Glass Set| Elegant Stainless Steel Salt and Pepper Dispenser| Spices W/Collapsible Funnel Black
features: ♥ PREMIUM QUALITY GLASS AND STAINLESS STEEL SHAKER SET with a glass bottom that helps to verify when shakers are getting low

♥ EASY REFILLING WITH NO MESSES this set is the perfect size to cut down on constant refills without being bulky. When you do have to refill, the clear glass bodies will let you know when it's time! The stainless steel top easily screws off revealing a wide opening for easy and mess free refills.
♥ Classic, elegant design; perfect for home kitchens, restaurant tables, cafes, deli shops; give the salt and pepper shaker gift set as a wedding present or housewarming gift

♥ ELEGANT DESIGN With its brushed stainless steel encasing, glass body and adjustable pour settings, this unique duo is a professional, sleek addition to any kitchen, with a stainless steel top that truly "caps" off this beautiful set
♥This refillable shaker has a large, hidden glass body with protective metal shell
♥Gently hand wash the 2-piece salt and pepper shaker set and towel-dry or air-dry
description: ✔★Seal In The Freshness And Keep Moisture Out by Closing The Cap. It comes in stainless steel black,- perfect for all kitchens! Easy To Clean & Easy To Fill ✔★ Wide Mouth Opening Make These Salt And Pepper Shakers Super Easy To Fill And Clean. Easily Removable Lid, Screws On And Off Very Easily. Comes With A Silicone Funnel For Even Easier Filling. ✔★You Can Fill With Pink Himalayan Salt, Black Pepper, Cumin, Turmeric, Paprika, Cayenne Pepper, Etc. Make Your Own Custom Spice Set! Beautiful Luxury Brushed Stainless Steel ✔★ Premium Luxury Look Of Brushed Stainless Steel Glass Bottom To Easily Identify What Spice Or Season Is In Each Shaker. Easily Identify When To Refill.
